form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (23.48) when fifth over 400m at this track in a Other. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and two places from eight starts. Expected to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early split and went straight to the front, scoring an all the way win (22.80) over 400m at this track. Recorded one of the quickest times on the card last time. Worth following up.
